CustomField.description: Set to true by the CE Intake OmniScript when the project sector is Water/Coastal and the project crosses jurisdictional waters. Triggers USACE Section 404 and CZMA federal consistency pre-consultation flags in NEPA_CE_Screener. Stage 16 finding: Water/Coastal sector carries 1.47x federal friction multiplier driven by CZMA consistency, EFH Magnuson-Stevens, and dual-track 404 review.
CustomField.label: EC: USACE Section 404 / CZMA
